health_conditions: torn rotator cuff 80% (right shoulder, confirmed via MRI)
left shoulder soreness from gym injury

benefits.description: Virtually no pain in left shoulder; very minimal pain in right shoulder only during certain exercises. Was able to significantly increase training workload including shoulder workouts.
Chronic 24/7 pain in right shoulder (torn rotator cuff) reduced to minimal pain only during certain exercises.

protocol_notes: Injected subcutaneously directly at the site of injury (shoulders), occasionally intramuscularly. Phase 1: 500mcg 2x daily from Jan 5 to Feb 5. Phase 2 planned: 250mcg 2x daily for another month then re-evaluate. Purchased from Canada Peptides Direct. Doubled the commonly cited dose of 250mcg due to body weight of 290 lbs.
